---
title: "discrepencies_round_2"
author: "djg"
date: "2026-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Columbus Continuity Check — Discrepancies Date: 2026-05-25 Source repo: /opt/data/repos-read/columbus Source commit reviewed: a9f2338 continuity updates Target repo: /opt/data/workspace/hermes-synthesis Scope Checked the updated Columbus Quarto site for continuity across: Daily itinerary pages Ticket/research pages June calendar Region overview pages README and homepage overview text Primary source of truth used for this pass: Day 4: Ghiberti Pass, booking 87-MKTRBNH, June 8, Santa Reparata 10:30 AM Day 5: Private Uffizi + Accademia tour, Viator 1391099919, June 9, 9:00 AM Day 7: Naples City Walking Tour, GetYourGuide GYGWZAX648G5, June 11, pickup 8:30 AM Day 8: Herculaneum & Vesuvius, Headout #31374926, June 12, meet 9:20 AM at Via Galileo Ferraris n.40 Day 9: Naples to Brindisi flight day, June 13 Day 10: Brindisi / first full day in Puglia, June 14 Days 11-15: 5-day Puglia tour, June 15-19 Day 16: Brindisi departure, June 20 Checks that now pass The recent continuity update appears to have fixed the main items from the 2026-05-25 continuity-audit design: Day 3 is now a free Florence exploration day, not a Duomo/Uffizi day. daily_itineraries/day-03-2026-06-07-florence.qmd:2,12,115 Florence tickets page now reflects confirmed bookings only. research/tickets-florence.md:1-18,34-56 Naples tickets page now reflects the Day 7 and Day 8 confirmed bookings. research/tickets-naples.md:1-18,30-44,73-80 June calendar includes the Naples Walking Tour and Herculaneum/Vesuvius rows, and the Day 8 calendar cell has the Headout booking details. research/june-calendar.qmd:155,160,268-269 Daily nav fixes from the prior plan are present. Day 6 next link: daily_itineraries/day-06-2026-06-10-florence.qmd:153 Day 9 previous link: daily_itineraries/day-09-2026-06-13-naples.qmd:188 Day 11 has been corrected to a 5-day Puglia tour starting June 15. daily_itineraries/day-11-2026-06-15-puglia.qmd:14,25 Open discrepancies found 1. Day 7 still says the Day 8 tour details are TBD File: daily_itineraries/day-07-2026-06-11-florence-to-naples.qmd:78 Current text: `Day 8 — Herculaneum & Vesuvius tour (details TBD — check confirmation)` Why it conflicts: Day 8 is now confirmed in its own page and in tickets/calendar: daily_itineraries/day-08-2026-06-12-naples-herculaneum.qmd:12,19-22 research/tickets-naples.md:30-42,77-78 research/june-calendar.qmd:160,269 Suggested correction: Replace the Day 7 prep heading with something like: `Day 8 — Herculaneum & Vesuvius tour: meet 9:20 AM at Via Galileo Ferraris n.40; booking #31374926` 2. Days 12-15 still describe the Puglia tour as 6 days / June 14-19 Files: daily_itineraries/day-12-2026-06-16-puglia.qmd:14 daily_itineraries/day-13-2026-06-17-puglia.qmd:14 daily_itineraries/day-14-2026-06-18-puglia.qmd:14 daily_itineraries/day-15-2026-06-19-puglia.qmd:14 Current repeated text: `This day is part of our 6-day Puglia organized tour (June 14-19). Specific itinerary will be updated once tour is confirmed.` Why it conflicts: Day 10 is now June 14 Brindisi orientation / first full day in Puglia, not a tour day. Day 11 says the tour is 5 days, June 15-19: daily_itineraries/day-10-2026-06-14-naples-to-brindisi.qmd:2,12,102 daily_itineraries/day-11-2026-06-15-puglia.qmd:14,25 Suggested correction: Change each Day 12-15 placeholder sentence to: `This day is part of our 5-day Puglia organized tour (June 15-19). Specific itinerary will be updated once tour is confirmed.` 3. Puglia region overview still treats June 14 as part of a 6-day tour File: regions/puglia.qmd Conflicting lines: line 3: subtitle says `Italy's Hidden Gem - 6 Days` line 13: `June 14-19` currently being finalized line 24: `6 days (June 14-19) on organized tour` line 41: `tour begins June 14` line 43: `Tour Days (June 14-19)` line 45: `6 full days exploring Puglia with organized tour` line 382: confirming availability for `June 14-19 dates` line 420: `Days 11-16 (June 14-19)` placeholder pages Why it conflicts: Day 10, June 14, is a Brindisi orientation day. The tour starts Day 11, June 15, and runs through Day 15, June 19. Day 16 is departure from Brindisi, June 20. Suggested correction: Update Puglia overview to distinguish: June 14: Brindisi orientation / buffer day June 15-19: 5-day Puglia tour June 20: departure Replace `Days 11-16` Puglia tour language with `Days 11-15`, and keep Day 16 as departure. 4. Homepage overview has shifted day/date mapping that no longer matches the daily itinerary files File: index.qmd Conflicting lines: line 27: `June 10-12 (Days 7-9): Naples & Herculaneum` line 29: `June 13 (Day 10): Journey to Puglia` line 31: `June 14-19 (Days 11-16): Puglia` / `Six-day tour` line 53: daily itinerary summary says `Days 7-9: Naples`, `Day 10: Travel to Puglia`, `Days 11-16: Puglia`, and also `Day 16: Departure from Brindisi` line 57: `Puglia portion (Days 11-16)` Why it conflicts: The daily itinerary files map as follows: Day 6: June 10, Florence to Naples Day 7: June 11, Naples walking tour Day 8: June 12, Herculaneum & Vesuvius Day 9: June 13, Naples to Brindisi Day 10: June 14, Brindisi orientation / first full Puglia day Days 11-15: June 15-19, Puglia tour placeholders Day 16: June 20, departure Suggested correction: Rewrite the overview bullets to align with the daily pages, for example: `June 10 (Day 6): Florence to Naples by Italo train` `June 11-12 (Days 7-8): Naples walking tour and Herculaneum/Vesuvius` `June 13 (Day 9): Naples to Brindisi flights` `June 14 (Day 10): Brindisi orientation / buffer day` `June 15-19 (Days 11-15): 5-day Puglia tour` `June 20 (Day 16): Departure from Brindisi` 5. README schedule is stale in the same way as the homepage File: README.md Conflicting lines: line 18: `Days 3-6 (Jun 6-9): Florence` — should start Jun 7 if Day 2 is Jun 6 arrival line 19: `Days 7-9 (Jun 10-12): Naples + Herculaneum` line 20: `Day 10 (Jun 13): Naples → Brindisi` line 21: `Days 11-16 (Jun 14-19): Puglia tour` line 22: `Day 16 (Jun 20): Departure from Brindisi` line 73: `Days 11-16 (Puglia tour)` Why it conflicts: It double-counts Day 16 as both Puglia tour and departure, and it shifts Naples/Puglia day numbers one day early compared with the daily itinerary files. Suggested correction: Bring README schedule into the same mapping recommended for index.qmd. 6. Naples region overview still describes old Naples day plan File: regions/naples.qmd Conflicting lines: line 32: `Day 1 (June 11): Herculaneum guided tour ...` line 34: `Day 2 (June 12): MANN museum ...` lines 390-395: suggested itinerary still says Herculaneum on Day 1 and MANN/Cappella on Day 2 line 424: research link text says `Tours - Herculaneum booking` Why it conflicts: Current confirmed Naples schedule is: June 11: Naples City Walking Tour with underground ruins and lunch, booking GYGWZAX648G5 June 12: Herculaneum & Vesuvius day trip, Headout #31374926 MANN and Cappella Sansevero are optional afternoon items, not the main confirmed Day 2 plan. Suggested correction: Update the Naples overview itinerary block to match Day 7 and Day 8. Keep MANN/Cappella as optional suggestions only. 7. Research tours page still says Herculaneum details are pending and Puglia is June 14-19 / 6 days File: research/tours.qmd Conflicting lines: line 13: `Herculaneum Archaeological Tour (June 11)` line 14: `Puglia Regional Tour (June 14-19)` line 25: Herculaneum & Vesuvius ref is `TBD`, status `details TBD` line 26: Puglia `Jun 14–19` lines 32-34: Herculaneum confirmed but details pending lines 283-291: Puglia Regional Tour `June 14-19`, `6-day organized tour`, `6 days / 5 nights` Why it conflicts: Herculaneum/Vesuvius now has provider, ref, and meeting location in Day 8 and tickets/calendar. Puglia tour should be June 15-19 / 5 days according to Day 11 and Day 10. Suggested correction: Update Herculaneum row/details to: Date: Jun 12 Ref: #31374926 Provider: Naples Tickets by Headout Meet: 9:20 AM, Via Galileo Ferraris n.40 Update Puglia tour to June 15-19 / 5 days, while noting June 14 is Brindisi orientation. 8. Pre-departure checklist still says to book/reconfirm a Jun 11 Herculaneum guide File: research/pre-departure-checklist.qmd Conflicting lines: line 86: `Herculaneum guided tour — book licensed guide for Jun 11` line 171: `Reconfirm Herculaneum guided tour — get exact meeting time/place` Why it conflicts: The Herculaneum/Vesuvius tour is now confirmed for Jun 12 with booking #31374926 and meeting point/time. Jun 11 is the Naples City Walking Tour. Suggested correction: Replace the Jun 11 booking task with a confirmation/saved-documents task for the Jun 12 Headout tour. Add/check a separate Jun 11 Naples Walking Tour task if the checklist needs all tours represented. Summary The main ticket/calendar/daily-page fixes landed, but secondary overview/checklist pages still carry stale assumptions from the older plan. The highest-impact follow-up is to normalize the trip skeleton everywhere: Day 6 / Jun 10: Florence to Naples Day 7 / Jun 11: Naples Walking Tour Day 8 / Jun 12: Herculaneum & Vesuvius Day 9 / Jun 13: Naples to Brindisi Day 10 / Jun 14: Brindisi orientation Days 11-15 / Jun 15-19: 5-day Puglia tour Day 16 / Jun 20: departure
